# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This project currently supports the latest version of the `master` branch.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| Latest  | Yes       |
| Older versions | No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please report it responsibly.

Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

Instead, report the issue by contacting the maintainer:

- GitHub: https://github.com/prmr

Please include the following information:

- A clear description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce the issue
- The affected files, features, or versions
- The possible impact
- Any suggested fix, if available

## Response Process

After receiving a report, the maintainer will review the issue and determine whether it is a valid security vulnerability.

If the report is valid, the maintainer will work on a fix and publish an update when appropriate.

## Disclosure Policy

Please do not publicly disclose the vulnerability until the maintainer has had time to investigate and address it.
